news.t: BlackRock launches U.S. equity ETFs with covered-call strategies as option-based funds surge
BlackRock Debuts First Buffer ETFs With Launch of Two Funds

overview.description: The iShares Large Cap Moderate Quarterly Laddered ETF (IVVM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 index. The fund seeks to participate in the price movement of US large-cap stocks, up to a cap, while applying a 5% buffer against losses, over each calendar quarter. The actively managed fund holds IVV ETF options with overlapping expiry dates. IVVM was launched on Jun 28, 2023 and is issued by BlackRock.
